prompt_text:
### Demographics: 55-year-old Asian man

### Visit type: Follow-up visit (12-month follow-up)

### Reason for visit / current symptoms
Reason for visit: Routine follow-up (every 3 months) | Diagnosis context: 4 years ago Diagnosed with type 2 diabetes during urgent care evaluation for fatigue/blurred vision
Current symptoms: Postprandial fatigue and thirst noted; no DKA/HHS signs; no recent hypoglycemia

### History
- Other conditions: Chronic kidney disease Stage 3b (30-44)
Heart failure: HFimpEF (NYHA Class II)
Simple Steatosis
Body mass index category: Normal
Chronic Obstructive Pulmonary Disease
Rheumatoid Arthritis
Recurrent Complicated Urinary Tract Infections
Cholelithiasis (status post cholecystectomy)
- Diabetes-related comorbidities: CKD: Stage 3b (30-44); HF: HFimpEF (NYHA Class II); ASCVD (No); MASLD: Simple Steatosis; BMI Category: Normal
- Family history: Type 2 diabetes (paternal grandfather)
- Social history: Never smoker; Alcohol 3-4 drinks/week (2-3 per sitting)

### Medication information
- Current medications: Metformin 500mg twice daily; Methotrexate (15 mg weekly), Fluticasone/salmeterol Inhaler (twice daily), Losartan (50 mg daily), Finerenone (10 mg daily), Ciprofloxacin (500 mg twice daily for 7 days)

### Physical exam (current)
Weight 70.1 kg; Height 180.1 cm; BMI 21.6 kg/m²; Blood pressure 118/62 mmHg

### Laboratory values (with date / relative timing)
Format: YYYY-MM-DD value or relative timing (12 months ago / 9 months ago / 6 months ago / 3 months ago / current)
Order: 12 months ago -> 9 months ago -> 6 months ago -> 3 months ago -> current
- Glycemia: HbA1c (12 months ago 10.0%; 9 months ago 9.5%; 6 months ago 9.0%; 3 months ago 8.5%; current 8.3%), FPG (12 months ago 216mg/dL; 9 months ago 227mg/dL; 6 months ago 237mg/dL; 3 months ago 233mg/dL; current 172mg/dL)
- Anthropometrics / blood pressure: Weight (12 months ago 68.7kg; 9 months ago 67.1kg; 6 months ago 66.7kg; 3 months ago 65.7kg; current 70.1kg), Height (12 months ago 180.1cm; 9 months ago 180.1cm; 6 months ago 180.1cm; 3 months ago 180.1cm; current 180.1cm), BMI (12 months ago 21.0kg/m²; 9 months ago 21.0kg/m²; 6 months ago 21.0kg/m²; 3 months ago 20.0kg/m²; current 21.6kg/m²), SBP (12 months ago 120mmHg; 9 months ago 120mmHg; 6 months ago 120mmHg; 3 months ago 120mmHg; current 118mmHg), DBP (12 months ago 65mmHg; 9 months ago 63mmHg; 6 months ago 65mmHg; 3 months ago 61mmHg; current 62mmHg)
- Liver function: ALT (12 months ago 60U/L; 9 months ago 61U/L; 6 months ago 68U/L; 3 months ago 70U/L; current 66U/L), AST (12 months ago 33U/L; 9 months ago 38U/L; 6 months ago 33U/L; 3 months ago 39U/L; current 36U/L), Total Bilirubin (12 months ago 1.0mg/dL; 9 months ago 1.0mg/dL; 6 months ago 0.9mg/dL; 3 months ago 0.8mg/dL; current 0.8mg/dL)
- Kidney: eGFR (12 months ago 37mL/min/1.73m²; 9 months ago 36mL/min/1.73m²; 6 months ago 35mL/min/1.73m²; 3 months ago 35mL/min/1.73m²; current 33mL/min/1.73m²), UACR (12 months ago 45mg/g; 9 months ago 47mg/g; 6 months ago 69mg/g; 3 months ago 74mg/g; current 66mg/g)
- Lipids: LDL (12 months ago 81mg/dL; 9 months ago 81mg/dL; 6 months ago 87mg/dL; 3 months ago 82mg/dL; current 84mg/dL); HDL (12 months ago 60mg/dL; 9 months ago 56mg/dL; 6 months ago 59mg/dL; 3 months ago 57mg/dL; current 58mg/dL); Triglycerides (12 months ago 178mg/dL; 9 months ago 165mg/dL; 6 months ago 163mg/dL; 3 months ago 179mg/dL; current 171mg/dL)
- Hemoglobin: Hemoglobin (12 months ago 11.0g/dL; 9 months ago 10.2g/dL; 6 months ago 10.0g/dL; 3 months ago 9.7g/dL; current 9.9g/dL)
- Additional tests: urine ketone Not measured (Current); fasting C-peptide 1.66 ng/mL (Current)

### Individualized treatment decision factors
Current adherence and self-management: Moderate adherence (estimated 70-90%); SMBG 1-3 times/week; lifestyle control inconsistent.
Financial context: Patient has standard insurance with moderate copays and a monthly medication budget of ≤ KRW 500,000.
